name: get-shit-done
description: Get Shit Done (GSD) — a meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code. Provides /gsd:plan-phase, /gsd:execute-phase, /gsd:discuss-phase, /gsd:new-project, and 80+ other workflow commands, plus 22+ sub-agents (gsd-planner, gsd-executor, gsd-plan-checker, etc.) and hooks for session/phase boundary tracking.
